name: playwright-cucumber-framework
description: Playwright + Cucumber BDD test automation framework in TypeScript.

scripts.test:smoke: sh -c 'TAGS=@smoke cucumber-js "$@"; TEST_EXIT_CODE=$?; ts-node src/support/generateReports.ts --generate-now; exit $TEST_EXIT_CODE' --
scripts.test:headed: sh -c 'HEADLESS=false cucumber-js "$@"; TEST_EXIT_CODE=$?; ts-node src/support/generateReports.ts --generate-now; exit $TEST_EXIT_CODE' --
scripts.report:all: npm run report:cucumber && npm run report:trace
